overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking through a rugged prairie landscape at night under moonlight. The character traverses a dirt path through grassy terrain with rocky outcrops, briefly pausing to observe the moon before continuing toward a rocky hillside.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path through open grassland toward a distant settlement

entered.detail: bright full moon visible in the night sky ahead
narrow dirt trail winding through the prairie
expansive grassy terrain stretching to the horizon
cluster of white rocks and boulders on the right side
small town with lights visible in the valley ahead
dark clouds partially covering the night sky

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dirt path through open grasslands at night. The moon illuminates the scene from ahead, with a distant settlement visible in the valley. Rocky outcrops dot the right side of the landscape under a partially cloudy sky.

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path as the terrain becomes more rugged with rocky formations

entered.detail: rugged rocky hillside with layered stone formations
dark mountain silhouettes on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking as the landscape transitions to more rugged terrain. The distant settlement fades from view while rocky hillsides appear on the right. The moon shifts to the left side of the frame as the path curves gently.

events.description: character stops walking and turns left to gaze up at the moon

agents.ego_description: character stands still and looks up at the moon, taking in the night sky

segments.scene_description: The character pauses on the trail to observe the moon, which shines brightly through the clouds. The camera pans left to frame the moon against the night sky while the character stands still on the dirt path.

events.description: character turns back to forward direction and resumes walking toward rocky terrain

agents.ego_description: walking steadily toward a large rocky hillside that dominates the path ahead

entered.detail: massive layered rock formation blocking the forward path

segments.scene_description: The character resumes walking, turning away from the moon to face a large rocky hill that looms ahead. The path continues toward the imposing rock formation as the character moves through the grassy prairie.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a moonlit prairie that transitions from open grasslands into a rugged, rocky hillside. It begins with the character walking along a dirt path toward a distant settlement in the valley, with rocky outcrops lining the right side under a cloudy night sky. As the path curves gently, the settlement fades from view and the moon shifts to the left of the frame while the terrain becomes increasingly rugged. The camera then pans left to frame the bright moon shining through the clouds as the character pauses momentarily on the trail. Finally, the character resumes walking, turning away from the lunar glow to face an imposing rocky hill that looms ahead across the grassy prairie.
